name: Calabacitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add zucchini and onion. Cook until just tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in garlic salt (or fresh garlic) and green chili mixture.
3. Stir in chopped corn and grated cheddar cheese. Mix well to combine.
4. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart casserole dish that has been greased with butter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
